description: German businessman, passenger and victim of United Airlines Flight 93 during the September 11 attacks
self-help organization of the German wine industry for the promotion of the quality and sales of German wines
public university in the Davis, California area; part of the University of California system
description_wiki: The University of California, Davis (UC Davis, UCD, or Davis) is a public land-grant research university in the Davis, California area, United States.
Biebelsheim is an Ortsgemeinde – a municipality belonging to a Verbandsgemeinde, a kind of collective municipality – in the Bad Kreuznach district in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

Rhineland-Palatinate ( RYNE-land pə-LAT-in-it, -⁠lənd-, US also  -⁠in-ayt; German: Rheinland-Pfalz [ˌʁaɪnlant ˈpfalts] ; Luxembourgish: Rheinland-Pfalz [ˌʀɑɪ̯nlɑm ˈpfɑlts]; Palatine German: Rhoilond-Palz) is a western state of Germany.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.
The September 11 attacks, colloquially known as 9/11, were a coordinated series of suicide attacks perpetrated by the Islamist terrorist organization al-Qaeda against the United States in 2001.

surface_forms: Flight 93 National Memorial in honor of Christian Adams
description: Shanksville, Pennsylvania memorial to the 4th plane that crashed on 9/11
description_wiki: The Flight 93 National Memorial is a memorial built to commemorate the crash of United Airlines Flight 93, which was one of four aircraft hijacked during the September 11 attacks in 2001.
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) is the domestic intelligence and security service of the United States and its principal federal law enforcement agency.

description: borough in Somerset County, Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Shanksville is a borough in Somerset County, Pennsylvania, United States.

description: small official office of one country in another country
description_wiki: A consulate is the office of a consul.
